title: Claude Code Output Style Frontmatter
description: Schema for validating YAML frontmatter in output style .md files

name.description: Style identifier (kebab-case). Optional — if omitted, the filename (minus .md) serves as the style name.

description.description: When and why to use this style — used for Claude's style discovery and selection.
examples: Structured analysis and documentation style with critique, optimization, and stakeholder alignment focus
Concise executive-facing style. Use when producing summaries, status updates, or decision briefs for senior stakeholders.

keep-coding-instructions.description: Whether to retain the default coding instructions when this style is active. Set to false to suppress coding-specific directives in non-engineering contexts.

version.description: Semantic version of the output style.

examples.name: executive-brief
examples.description: Concise executive-facing style. Use when producing summaries, status updates, or decision briefs for senior stakeholders.
examples.author: Platform Team

examples.name: analytical-documentation
examples.description: Structured analysis and documentation style with critique, optimization, and stakeholder alignment focus
Step-by-step tutorial style optimised for onboarding. Use when writing guides, walkthroughs, or how-to documents.
